global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 deal for late-night offers.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'BiteRush' in a bold, modern font, positioned prominently at the top.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bright yellow, drawing attention.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Text stating '2-for-1 tonight' in a large, clear font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Details text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main offer that reads 'Late-night deals available', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Try for free' in a bold font, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The word 'BiteRush' appears at the top in a prominent font, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: The text 'Try for free' is displayed on a button, encouraging users to engage with the offer.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small, bright yellow 'SALE' text positioned at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, BiteRush logo, sale offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer text is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight, Late-night deals available, BiteRush, Try for free, SALE
